process_execution_step_file.COMMENT: Represent every input/output of a (logical) step operation. This includes actual input files, configuration files, output results and any generated sample/QA/KPI data.

CHECKS: ((type IS NULL) OR (CAST((type) AS TEXT) = ANY(CAST((ARRAY[CAST('STRING' AS CHARACTER VARYING), CAST('DOUBLE' AS CHARACTER VARYING), CAST('LONG' AS CHARACTER VARYING), CAST('DATE' AS CHARACTER VARYING)]) AS TEXT[]))))
